creator: s.khoudali@yahoo.fr
text:
when i boot with the media, i show this error:

CD Loader 1.2
Building the boot loader arguments
Looking up /BOOT/LOADER... Found
Relocation the loader and the BTX
Starting the BTX loader
_
BTX loader 1.00 BTX version is 1.02

int=0000000d err=0000c400 efl=00010286 eip=b7986009
eax=7B7ca2d4 ebx=00000f32 ecx=ffffffd4 edx=00000001
esi=00000000 edi=00049220 ebp=00094BC6 esp=00094703
cs=002b ds=0033 es=0000 fs=0033 gs=0033 ss=0033
cs:epi=c4 54 4f 53 48 49 42 41-30 30 36 43 20 20 20 14
       09 09 20 54 41 53 4d 00-00 01 04 84 00 99 b7 cd
ss:esp=07 47 09 00 0b 47 09 00-0f 00 00 01 00 00 00 32
       0f 00 00 1a 47 09 00 1e-47 09 00 22 47 09 00 0f
BTX halted

Fix: 

no idea
How-To-Repeat: this message appears everytime i boot with the installation media.  it
appears before the boot menu appears
